productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Sports Black Sports Shoes
description: Strengthen your running work-outs without compromising on style in the adidas Astride running shoe. With a responsive formation design and adaptive midfoot support, this makes for a perfect shoe training and work-outs.UpperSuede and synthetic upper for absolute durability, breathability and comfortadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMeshed and padded collar and tongue for enhanced breathability and snug, comfortable FitMeshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised fitErgonomically curved and padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionadiPRENE inserts in the heel for enhanced shock absorption and better heel-strikeOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves for ease of movement and enhanced durabilityStrategically placed lugs for absolute grip and traction, enhanced with Traxion technology to reduce stud pressure of firm ground Speedgrip in the heel for absolute support when running at high speedShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a suede brush to clean the upperDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
